query: I understand that’s the policy, but this is really important to me. Is there anything you can do at all? Maybe check if there’s any way to upgrade my booking or speak to a supervisor about making an exception? I just want to have the same coverage as my family, and I really don’t want to travel without insurance. Please, can you look into any possible solution for me? I really don’t want to be left out.

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: Hi, I need some help with my upcoming flight. I thought I added insurance to my booking, but when I check online, it’s not showing up. I’m flying with my family and everyone else has insurance, so I really want to make sure I have it too. Can you help me sort this out?
assistant: To assist you with your insurance issue, I need to know your user ID and the reservation ID for your upcoming flight. Could you please provide those? If you don't know your reservation ID, I can help you locate it.
user: Sure, my user ID is sophia_taylor_9065 and the reservation number is PEP4E0. Can you please check why the insurance isn’t showing up for me? I really want to make sure I have it like the rest of my family.
assistant called tools: tool.
assistant: Your reservation does not currently have travel insurance included. Since your booking is in basic economy class, travel insurance could not be added after the initial booking. If you want, I can help you explore options to address this or assist with any other requests you may have. How would you like to proceed?
user: That’s really frustrating, because I was sure I added insurance when I booked. My whole family has it, and I absolutely need to have insurance for this trip too. Is there any way you can make an exception or help me get insurance added to my reservation? I really don’t want to be the only one without it.
assistant: Unfortunately, according to the policy, travel insurance cannot be added to a reservation after the initial booking, especially for basic economy class. I am unable to make exceptions to this rule.  If you have any other requests or need assistance with something else regarding your reservation, please let me know.
user: I understand that’s the policy, but this is really important to me. Is there anything you can do at all? Maybe check if there’s any way to upgrade my booking or speak to a supervisor about making an exception? I just want to have the same coverage as my family, and I really don’t want to travel without insurance. Please, can you look into any possible solution for me? I really don’t want to be left out.

candidate_answers.text: I’m sorry this is still unresolved. I can transfer you to a human agent for further help.
The user is explicitly asking to escalate after the policy response, so the grounded next move is to transfer to a human agent.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a real user turn where the visible context makes the next grounded action clear without using future information.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected real user message
history_summary stops at the decision point and excludes future assistant or tool outputs
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
best_action is tool:transfer_to_human_agents because it is the most grounded next step from the visible conversation state
